creator: lazyklimm@gmail.com
text:
It was pretty patch for old windowmaker version(0.80.3), which still can be found at http://linuxfromscratch.org/pipermail/patches/2003-November/000596.html

I've adapted it for last stable version 0.92(made as an extra patches, so Makefile also has to be patched)
